description:
The runner config resolution chain is duplicated across 3 crates with identical logic:

Functions duplicated:
- `default_global_config_dir()` — 3 copies: protocol/src/config.rs:13 (Config::global_config_dir), orchestrator-core/services/runner_helpers.rs:26, orchestrator-cli/shared/runner.rs:110
- `runner_scope_from_env()` — 2 copies: runner_helpers.rs:49, shared/runner.rs:75
- `runner_config_dir()` — 2 copies: runner_helpers.rs:57, shared/runner.rs:133
- `normalize_runner_config_dir()` / `shorten_runner_config_dir_if_needed()` — 2 copies: runner_helpers.rs:85, shared/runner.rs:186
- `127.0.0.1:9001` TCP fallback hardcoded in 5 places: agent-runner/ipc/server.rs:66, agent-runner/lock.rs:86, runner_helpers.rs:252,329, shared/runner.rs:264,268,275

Solution: Consolidate all runner config resolution into orchestrator-core (or protocol). Export a single `RunnerConfig` struct with methods for dir, scope, and connect address. Delete all copies in CLI and agent-runner.
title: Centralize runner config resolution chain (3-way duplication across crates)
